notes: Fun fact: Rwanda banned single-use plastic bags in 2008, over a decade before most European countries even discussed it. Kigali is consistently ranked the cleanest city in Africa.
highlights: Liked: The cleanliness and order is immediately noticeable. Kigali runs with a discipline and intentionality that most cities in the region aspire to.
Did not like: The pace of development, while impressive, can feel highly controlled. Innovation happens within tight guardrails.
